message:
test: Fix flaky bloom filter assertion and remove stale doc comment

1. connectors/mod.rs: Remove assertion on bloom filter rejections count.
   Bloom filters have false positives by design - a non-member path might
   pass the bloom check but will correctly return false from contains().
   The test now verifies the overall contains() result is correct rather
   than asserting on internal bloom rejection counts.

2. e2e_cli_flows.rs: Remove orphaned doc comment for run_logged_test
   function that was previously deleted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
